pi_items.source: Task description step 7: 'Save the drawing as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/crane_lift_plan.dxf'
Task description step 2 lists all four required layers with their specified colors
Task description step 3: 'Draw the tail swing danger zone as a circle centered at (0,0) with radius 3.6m'
Task description step 4: 'Draw a vertical line representing the building wall starting at (6.0, -10.0) and ending at (6.0, 15.0)'
Task description step 5: 'Draw the Pick Point (truck location) as a circle with radius 0.5m centered at (-10.0, 5.0)'
Task description step 5: 'Draw the Set Point (roof location) as a circle with radius 0.5m centered at (12.0, 8.0)'

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified against the task description. The task creates a synthetic LibreCAD drawing (crane_lift_plan.dxf) containing a mobile crane lift plan site view with specified geometric parameters: tail swing circle radius of 3.6 meters centered at origin, vertical building wall at x=6.0, pick point at (-10.0, 5.0) with radius 0.5m, and set point at (12.0, 8.0) with radius 0.5m. Four required layers are specified: CRANE_SETUP (red), BUILDING (white/black), LOAD_PATH (green), and ANNOTATIONS (yellow). All geometric coordinates and layer names match the task requirements exactly.
